ImageDescription.value:
Lilium Golden Splendor at Capel Manor College and Gardens, Bulls Cross, Enfield, London, England.
Capel Manor College and Gardens in Enfield is the only Greater London college for 'land based' studies. The gardens, which are open to the public, are tended by students as part of course work.
To see the most relevant allied photos, click on Capel Manor College and Gardens, and this uploader's Parks and Gardens photos. You can find image links related to this one in a variety of ways at the very bottom of the page. This image is one of a series of date and/or subject allied consecutive photographs kept in progression or location by file name number and/or time marking.
Camera: Canon PowerShot SX60 HS.
Software: file lens-corrected and optimized with DxO PhotoLab 7 Elite.
